text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Other Chronic or Potentially Disabling Conditions Segment Codebook │ August 2025 │ V 1.7 
17 
CYSFIB_MEDICARE 
LABEL: 
Cystic Fibrosis and Other Metabolic Developmental Disorders End-of-Year Indicator — Medicare Only 
Claims 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether a beneficiary met the condition criteria for cystic fibrosis and other 
metabolic developmental disorders as of the end of the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME:
